column1: # Status line shows the active file's base name after a successful
# save. Before the save the left slot carries the current date/time —
# that's covered by the format_status_date unit test since asserting a
# live clock in a transcript would be flaky.
# Save a workbook so active_path is set.
# After the save the status line should carry the file's base name
# (no path, no extension stripping — the filename as saved).
